title: import_tract_classifications_v1 — manifest contract for ngsTracts TSV captures
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_tract_classifications'. Reads an ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv (per ngsTracts/docs/METHODOLOGY.md §5.1) from disk and emits a staging_tract_classifications_v0 layer. Bridges the producer-side ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01 output into the atlas layer envelope contract without re-running the classifier.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the tract_classifications.tsv file (typically under ngsTracts/out/).

step.description: Which ngsTracts step produced the TSV. STEP_TRC_02 adds refined_breakpoint_bp / refined_ci_left / refined_ci_right columns.

max_rows.description: Optional cap for very large fixtures.
